primary.name: brand.primary
primary.description:
- The main brand color that represents your identity
- Should be distinctive and memorable
- Used for primary actions and key UI elements
- Should meet WCAG contrast requirements
primary.usage:
- Main call-to-action buttons
- Primary navigation elements
- Key interactive elements
- Brand logo
- Important highlights

secondary.name: brand.secondary
secondary.description:
- Supports the primary brand color
- Creates visual hierarchy
- Used for secondary actions
- Should complement primary color
secondary.usage:
- Secondary buttons
- Alternative navigation elements
- Supporting UI elements
- Complementary to primary actions
- Secondary highlights

accent.name: brand.accent
accent.description:
- Adds personality to the UI
- Creates visual interest
- Used sparingly for emphasis
- Should be distinctive but not overwhelming
accent.usage:
- Accent elements
- Decorative highlights
- Special features
- Micro-interactions
- Visual interest points

tertiary.name: brand.tertiary
tertiary.description:
- Provides additional color variation
- Used for subtle emphasis
- Creates depth in the UI
- Should be subtle and supportive
tertiary.usage:
- Tertiary actions
- Background accents
- Subtle highlights
- Supporting decorative elements
- Alternative emphasis

neutral.name: brand.neutral
neutral.description:
- Provides balance to brand colors
- Used for non-branded elements
- Creates visual hierarchy
- Should be versatile and subtle
neutral.usage:
- Text colors
- Backgrounds
- Borders
- Dividers
- Subtle UI elements

success.name: brand.success
success.description:
- Represents positive outcomes
- Should be distinct from primary brand color
- Used for success feedback
- Should be accessible
success.usage:
- Success states
- Positive actions
- Confirmation messages
- Progress indicators
- Achievement highlights

error.name: brand.error
error.description:
- Represents critical or error states
- Should be attention-grabbing
- Used for error feedback
- Should be accessible
error.usage:
- Error states
- Warning messages
- Critical actions
- Delete buttons
- Alert indicators

warning.name: brand.warning
warning.description:
- Represents cautionary states
- Should be noticeable but not alarming
- Used for warning feedback
- Should be accessible
warning.usage:
- Warning states
- Cautionary messages
- Attention indicators
- Pending states
- Temporary highlights

info.name: brand.info
info.description:
- Represents informational states
- Should be clear and readable
- Used for information feedback
- Should be accessible
info.usage:
- Information states
- Help messages
- Tooltips
- Guidance indicators
- Status updates

gradient.name: brand.gradient
gradient.description:
- Creates visual interest
- Adds depth to UI
- Used for special sections
- Should complement solid colors
gradient.usage:
- Hero sections
- Feature highlights
- Background effects
- Decorative elements
- Special sections
